parameters.query:
-- Weekly maintenance: prune historical data + reclaim space.
-- All deletes are bounded by age + status to avoid touching live work.
--
-- 1. Old n8n executions (>30d, success only)
-- 2. Old resolved system_alerts (>30d, status=resolved)
-- 3. Old diagnostic_history runs (>90d)
-- 4. Old archived dead_letter rows (>90d, already archived)
-- 5. VACUUM ANALYZE the active tables to reclaim space + refresh stats

WITH
exec_pruned AS (
  DELETE FROM execution_entity
   WHERE "finished" = true
     AND status = 'success'
     AND "stoppedAt" < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  RETURNING 1
),
alert_pruned AS (
  DELETE FROM system_alerts
   WHERE status = 'resolved'
     AND last_updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  RETURNING 1
),
diag_pruned AS (
  DELETE FROM diagnostic_history
   WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
  RETURNING 1
),
dlq_pruned AS (
  DELETE FROM dead_letter_archive
   WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM exec_pruned)  AS executions_pruned,
       (SELECT count(*) FROM alert_pruned) AS alerts_pruned,
       (SELECT count(*) FROM diag_pruned)  AS diagnostics_pruned,
       (SELECT count(*) FROM dlq_pruned)   AS dead_letter_archive_pruned;

INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, pipeline_version, result, ai_parsed)
VALUES ('cleanup', 'weekly_sweep', '1.0', 'success',
        jsonb_build_object('executions_pruned', {{ $('Cleanup Sweep').first().json.executions_pruned }},
                           'alerts_pruned',     {{ $('Cleanup Sweep').first().json.alerts_pruned }},
                           'diagnostics_pruned', {{ $('Cleanup Sweep').first().json.diagnostics_pruned }},
                           'dead_letter_archive_pruned', {{ $('Cleanup Sweep').first().json.dead_letter_archive_pruned }}))
RETURNING id;
